title: panax pseudoginseng var. notoginseng
intro: Panax pseudoginseng var. notoginseng, also known as Chinese ginseng or San Qi, is a type of plant native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to improve circulation, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Panax pseudoginseng var. notoginseng include reducing blood pressure, improving cognitive function, and enhancing athletic performance. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to promote overall well-being and vitality.
